title: Chenolea quinquecuspis
parts: Unfortunately, I don't know the specific medicinal parts of Chenolea quinquecuspis.
intro: Chenolea quinquecuspis, also known as the Quince Bush or Chenopodium quinquecuspis, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the family Chenopodiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, due to its purported anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The bioactive constituents of Chenopodium quinquecuspis include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Herbal preparations made from Chenopodium quinquecuspis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and skin conditions.
